race.description: Asahi Incentive Sprint Series Heat F&M Class 2 Plate
race.comment: Host of scratchings out of the chances. Paves the way for BOOMSHANKA (8) to find winning form again. Resumed from a long break here at this trip with a fast-finishing third and can only be fitter. Leading rider aboard and has the inside. Looks tough to stop late again.  CHERRABAH (2) was a Class 1 winner at Doomben eight days ago and on the quick back-up. Low draw and aided by some of the scratchings coming out who would have pushed forward. Should find the front and will take catching again. BREEZIN' (11) was a close-up fourth in a similar race here last time and continues to perform well. Deserves another chance. TRAFALGAR SQUARE (5) resumes and looks next best.
